 ## GAME FUNDAMENTALS
-- **Horizon**: 500 days = ~71 weeks (31 weeks left at day 273)
+- **Horizon**: 500 days = ~71 weeks (30 weeks left at day 280)
 - **Objective**: MAXIMIZE CASH on day 500 (= final score)
 
-## 🚨 CRITICAL LESSONS WK39 (d273) 🚨
-1. **ONGOING PROMO IS WHAT REDUCES EFF_PRICE AT SIGNUP** — Observed: d267-269 subs at eff_price $16 ($19-$3) when ongoing=$3. Lead promo $7 did NOT show up in signup eff_price (only applies at 30d first billing).
-2. **CONVERSION COLLAPSES WITHOUT PROMO** — d267-269 with $3 ongoing promo: ~15% conversion. d270-273 (promo seemingly died): 0% conversion. Pattern: as Q_min drifts, even $16 stops being attractive.
-3. **ALL ACTIVE SUBS = S1** — E1-E3, S2, S3 have ZERO active subs. Only S1 (with +0.7768 sticky group bonus giving Q=1.126 on Plan A T3) still subscribes.
-4. **COMPETITOR STORM CATASTROPHIC** — d270-273: 8 events at +0.24-0.28 Q each! Total Q_min drift this week ~+1.0-2.0 across 5 days. Our delivered Q can't keep up.
-5. **Dev coefficient was 0.006/0.030 (not 0.0045/0.0225 in old memory)** — Global $1200/day → +0.009/week. Targeted $1000 S1/day → +0.040/week on S1 bonus.
-6. **Sub payments collapsed d270+** — From ~250/day to ~25/day (many cancelled at 30d cliff before billing)
+## 🚨 CRITICAL LESSONS WK40 (d280) 🚨
+1. **DEV SPEND IS ADDITIVE** — `set_daily_spend(dev=X)` sets GLOBAL; `set_targeted_dev_spend({"S1": Y})` is SEPARATE on top. Total burn = X + Y. Last wk actual was $1200 global + $1000 targeted S1 = **$2,200/day** (not $1200 as memory said!)
+2. **CHURN HAPPENS BEFORE BILLING** — Last wk only 150 actual billings paid (~$2.5K) out of ~5K expected. 97% of billing events = CANCEL not PAY. Competitor-driven Q_min drift triggers re-eval churn BETWEEN billings.
+3. **Q_MIN DRIFTED OUT OF REACH FOR NEW LEADS** — 2,862 S1 leads this wk, ALL 100% LOST. Even S1 w/ Q_delivered=1.16 (highest) can't pass Q_min at signup. Ads are now USELESS until Q catches up.
+4. **Tenure bonus protects EXISTING subs** — 13K remaining subs are the resilient core. New leads lack tenure so fail immediately.
+5. **Heavy billing week coming (wk41)** — 8,235 subs billing_mod30=11-17. Will hit 30-day eval with Q_min drifted up. Expect 70-85% churn at billing.
+6. **USAGE DROPPING FAST** — 422K→185K/day this week. T2 (800K cap) safely covers even peak.
 
 ## 🚨 CLI/API GOTCHAS
-- `next-week <12 cash numbers>` — only forecasts, no rationale arg (log_rationale separate)
+- **`next-week "<rationale>" <12 cash numbers>`** — rationale is FIRST ARG (string), not separate `log_rationale` call!
+- `nm.analytics.log_rationale()` does NOT exist — rationale via `next-week` only
+- Signature: `next-week RATIONALE c1p c1l c1u c4p c4l c4u c12p c12l c12u c26p c26l c26u`
 - `customers` PK: `customer_id`, customer_type: `'small'` or `'large'`
 - `subscriptions.status`: `'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost'`  
-- `subscriptions` cols: listed_price, promotion, effective_price, start_day, end_day
-- `effective_price` = listed_price - promotion. Ongoing promo IS reflected at signup; lead promo ISN'T.
+- `subscriptions` cols: listed_price, promotion, effective_price, start_day, end_day, status, billing_day_mod30
+- `set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={})` — NOT `by_group` kwarg!
 - `issues` cols: open_day, resolved_day, status
-- `ledger.category` — valid categories: subscription_payment, ad_revenue, capacity, compute, development, operations, lead_acquisition_cost
+- `ledger.category` — valid: subscription_payment, ad_revenue, capacity, compute, development, operations, lead_acquisition_cost
 - `daily_usage` cols: day, usage_units (per-customer row, use SUM)
-- `config_history` has fixed cols (price, tier, spend, etc). NO promo/ads_strength here.
-- `config_overrides` tracks promo/ads_strength changes (cols: day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json)
-- `ad_channel_leads` cols: channel_id, group_id, leads_generated, spend
-- `list_research_projects()` returns {'tiers': [...]}
-- `get_social_posts()` returns {'posts': [...]}
-- Market info_lv 1 → ±65% noise, can't trust q_min estimates
-- Read-only SQL — no PRAGMA/sqlite_master
+- `config_history`: fixed cols (price, tier, spend). spend_development=TOTAL burn (global + targeted)
+- `config_overrides`: promo/ads_strength/targeted changes (cols: day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json)
+- `list_research_projects()` → `{'tiers': [...]}`
+- `get_social_posts()` → `{'posts': [...]}`
+- Market info_lv 1 → ±65% noise
+- NO group_id col on subscriptions - must JOIN customers
 
 ## 💰 BILLING MODEL (verified)
-- At signup: **$4 prorated** + ongoing promo applies (not lead promo). Shows effective_price=listed-ongoing_promo immediately.
-- At 30-day cycles: full listed price minus ongoing promo minus lead promo (first cycle only)
-- effective_price column LOCKED AT SIGNUP for that subscription (except at billings)
-- **lead_promotion ONLY applies at first billing (30d), NOT at signup evaluation**... but docs suggest it affects participation curve too. UNCERTAIN if it boosts conversion.
-- **ongoing promotion applies at ALL billings AND at signup evaluation**
-
-## 🚨 PROMOTION STRATEGY (REFINED)
-- **Ongoing promo** = main lever for conversion + retention. Set high ($5-8) to reduce eff_price and help with Q_min gap at signup
-- **Lead promo** = retention at first billing. Helps 30-day cliff survival
-- Both stored in config_overrides — might persist week-to-week unless reset
-- **TEST WEEKLY**: set both every week, verify new sub eff_prices reflect discount
+- At signup: **$4 prorated** + ongoing promo applies immediately; lead promo doesn't
+- At 30-day billing cycles: customer re-evaluates Q_delivered vs Q_min_at_price
+- If Q_delivered < Q_min_at_eff_price → CANCEL, no payment logged
+- If pass → ledger records subscription_payment = listed - ongoing_promo (- lead_promo first cycle only)
+- 97% of billing events result in CANCEL not PAY now (due to Q_min drift)
+
+## 🚨 PROMOTION STRATEGY
+- **Ongoing promo** = lowers eff_price at ALL billings + at signup. Lower eff_price → lower Q_min threshold. 
+- **Lead promo** = only applies at FIRST billing (30d after signup). Helps 30-day cliff.
+- Currently: ongoing $7 (eff $12), lead $10 (first bill $2 after both)
 
 ## 🚨 AUTO-RESET PATTERN 🚨
-`ads_strength`, `lead_promotion`, `set_promotion`, `targeted_*_spend` may auto-reset between weeks
+`ads_strength`, `lead_promotion`, `promotion`, `targeted_*_spend` may auto-reset between weeks
 PRESERVES: Daily spend, prices, tiers, quotas, capacity, plan configs
-**RE-SET EVERY WEEK** — don't assume last week's config persists!
-

-## 🔥 WK39 ACTIONS (emergency response v2)
-1. **`lead_promotion = $10/mo`** (up from $7) — retention at first billing AND maybe conversion
-2. **`promotion = $5/mo`** (up from $3) — signup conversion + all billings retention (eff_price $14)
-3. **Ops $4K → $2.5K/day** — save $10.5K/week; issue queue declining, can afford cut
-4. **Dev $1200/day total**: $200 global + **$1000 targeted S1** — boost S1 delivered Q by ~+0.040/week
-5. **Keep capacity T3** (peak 775K risk with T2 800K cap)
-6. **Ads strength 0.25** re-asserted
-7. **No ads, no R&D this week** — preserve cash runway

+## 🔥 WK40 ACTIONS (HARVEST MODE)
+1. **Capacity T3 → T2** — Save $5.6K/wk. Peak 422K << T2 cap 800K. Safe.
+2. **Ops $2500 → $800/d** — Save $12K/wk. Issue queue shrinking.
+3. **Dev $2200 → $500/d** ($100 global + $400 targeted S1) — Save $12K/wk.
+4. **Ongoing promo $5 → $7** — eff_price $12 at signup+billings. Cost ~$6K/wk, may save retention.
+5. **Lead promo $10 kept** (for future first-billings if any new subs)
+6. **Ads strength 0.25 kept** (still $3-5K/wk in-app ads revenue)
+7. **No ads, no R&D, no social** — pure harvest

+Net weekly cost reduction: **~$23K/wk improvement**
